whyChooseUs.eyebrow: Why the island moves with us
whyChooseUs.title: We don’t just offer taxis; we offer peace of mind and real efficiency
whyChooseUs.subtitle: Our platform is designed to meet Lanzarote’s mobility needs with speed, precision, and a fully local approach.

fastDeployment.title: Fast Dispatch
fastDeployment.description: Average assignment times under 4 minutes thanks to our proximity-based algorithm.

efficiency.title: Maximum Efficiency
efficiency.description: Smart allocation reduces idle time and optimizes every trip.

localExperts.title: Local Experts
localExperts.description: Drivers who know every area, access point, roundabout, and key location on the island.

security.title: 24/7 Safety
security.description: Continuous monitoring, trip tracking, and support available at all times.

whyChooseNexTaxi.title: Why choose NexTaxi?
whyChooseNexTaxi.subtitle: We offer the safest and most efficient transport experience across Lanzarote.

availability.title: 24/7 Availability
availability.description: We’re always there when you need us, day or night.

localExperts.title: Local Experts
localExperts.description: Experienced, licensed drivers who know every corner of Lanzarote.

coverage.title: Island-wide Coverage
coverage.description: From Arrecife Airport to Playa Blanca and beyond.

contactBanner.title: Ready to get in touch with us?
contactBanner.description: Our team is available to help you with bookings, inquiries, or additional information.
